sizing_rule.note: Only enter a trade if the dollar risk (position_size × stop_width) does not exceed 1% of account equity. This enforces a hard cap on absolute dollar risk per trade based on the required stop-loss width for the instrument.

source_rule_text: A trader should only trade an instrument if the minimum position size required to respect a wide stop-loss does not represent an unacceptably large dollar amount relative to their account or risk tolerance.
